active_verify.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive c>N correctness gate did not pass: no primitive correctness artifact path provided; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
active_verify.label: active_c2_verify

commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.profiler_smoke: env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv -d /tmp/hipengine-iter352-c4-first4-profiler/raw -o c4-first4 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --fixture /tmp/hipengine-prebench/fixtures/qwen36_paro_8x512_prompt_ids.json --prompt-length 512 --batch-size 4 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 8 --max-layers 40 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-retained/hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-iter352-c4-first4-profiler/c4-first4-profiler-bench.json

conclusion: The current c4 no-flag default after iter351 is profiler/baseline-attached under selected rowchunk layers [3,7,11,15]. The profiled smoke and the baseline attachment both stayed generated-token green at [137]*4; scaling references loaded with aggregate_vs_c1=1.1297 and aggregate_vs_serial_bridge=1.3987; the profiler summary contains expected native batch full-attention/KV, grouped-MoE, accepted c-aware projection, row-aware output GEMV, linear segment decode, batch residual combine, batch argmax, and final-cast kernels. This is required runtime evidence only: selected rowchunk layers keep native_caware_decode=false, and no retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path on selected layers
